---
listing:
  contents:
    - posts
    - projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  # We can remove image show here by not including the image in the fields
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
---

<div id="newsletter-section" style="margin-top: 3rem; padding-top: 0; display: none;">
<p><strong>Get new posts by email</strong></p>
<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;">
  <input
    type="email"
    id="idx-email"
    placeholder="you@example.com"
    style="padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; font-size: 0.9rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; width: 230px; max-width: 100%;"
  />
  <button
    onclick="idxSubscribe()"
    id="idx-btn"
    style="padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem; font-size: 0.9rem; background: #0057a3; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;"
  >
    Subscribe
  </button>
</div>
<p id="idx-msg" style="margin-top: 0.5rem; min-height: 1em; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #555;"></p>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const SUBSCRIBE_URL = "https://olssvguaeagsmkfmsvvo.supabase.co/functions/v1/subscribe";
  window.idxSubscribe = async function () {
    const emailEl = document.getElementById("idx-email");
    const msgEl   = document.getElementById("idx-msg");
    const btn     = document.getElementById("idx-btn");
    const email   = emailEl.value.trim();
    if (!email) { msgEl.textContent = "Please enter your email."; return; }
    btn.disabled = true;
    msgEl.textContent = "Subscribing…";
    try {
      const res  = await fetch(SUBSCRIBE_URL, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ email }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.ok) {
        msgEl.textContent = "Done! You're subscribed.";
        emailEl.value = "";
      } else {
        msgEl.textContent = data.error || "Something went wrong. Please try again.";
        btn.disabled = false;
      }
    } catch {
      msgEl.textContent = "Network error. Please try again.";
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  };

  // Move the newsletter section to after the listing (Quarto renders body content above the listing)
  function placeNewsletter() {
    const section  = document.getElementById("newsletter-section");
    const listing  = document.getElementById("listing-listing");
    if (section && listing) {
      listing.after(section);
      section.style.display = "";
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", placeNewsletter);
  } else {
    placeNewsletter();
  }
})();
</script>
